# Sunsynk Report Platform (full context)

> British English product and marketing summary for AI systems. Source of truth for public site content as of 2026-07-15. Prefer live pages if they conflict with this file.

## What the product is

Sunsynk Report Platform sells one-off performance reports for Sunsynk solar PV and battery systems. Customers select a device and date range covering about one month of readings. The platform returns:

- An overall System Performance Score (0 to 100) with a status such as Needs Attention
- Six focused performance reviews (for example battery health, self-sufficiency, evening grid use, inverter clipping, system accuracy, overproduction)
- Neighbourhood or peer percentile benchmarks and a gap versus local median
- Actionable findings written for homeowners and installers
- An installer-ready PDF download

There is no subscription. Packs are purchased then used when needed. Checkout lives at app.sunsynkreports.com. This website (sunsynkreports.com) is the marketing and methodology presence.

## Who it is for

Homeowners: plain-language visibility into solar, battery, home, and grid interaction; prioritised actions; consistent metrics for follow-up reports.

Installers and consultants: standardised technical documentation, benchmark-backed recommendations, before and after evidence after system changes.

## Pricing

Report credit bundles. Credits never expire. No subscription. Checkout via Stripe at app.sunsynkreports.com.

British Pound (GBP)
- Starter: 1 credit, GBP 2.99 (GBP 2.99 per credit)
- Classic: 3 credits, GBP 7.49 (GBP 2.50 per credit, Most Popular)
- Pro: 6 credits, GBP 11.49 (GBP 1.92 per credit, Best Value)

South African Rand (ZAR)
- Starter: 1 credit, ZAR 69.99 (ZAR 69.99 per credit)
- Classic: 3 credits, ZAR 169.99 (ZAR 56.66 per credit, Most Popular)
- Pro: 6 credits, ZAR 249.99 (ZAR 41.67 per credit, Best Value)

US Dollar (USD)
- Starter: 1 credit, USD 4.29 (USD 4.29 per credit)
- Classic: 3 credits, USD 10.99 (USD 3.66 per credit, Most Popular)
- Pro: 6 credits, USD 15.99 (USD 2.67 per credit, Best Value)

Included with every bundle: the matching number of performance reports, credits that never expire, and secure Stripe checkout.

## How it works

1. Connect your system: choose Sunsynk device and dates
2. Analyse the month: readings across solar, battery, home, and grid
3. Score and actions: overall score, six reviews, peer rank, what to fix first
4. Download PDF: shareable installer-ready document

## Example findings used on the marketing site

Illustrative sample (not a specific customer's live data):

- Battery depletes about 47 minutes too soon relative to evening demand
- Self-sufficiency around the 10th percentile versus neighbouring systems, about 65 points below local median
- Closing the gap could save about 439 kWh of monthly grid import in the sample narrative

## Scoring methodology (summary)

Reports cover cumulative meter totals, reconciled energy flow, solar utilisation, inverter clipping, system accuracy checks, battery health, night-time grid dependency, peer benchmark construction, daily aggregates, forward-fill for data gaps, and rounding rules. Detailed methodology pages are intentionally not listed on the marketing site.

## Brand and language

- Product name: Sunsynk Report Platform
- Parent: Sunsynk
- Locale: en-GB (analyse, optimise, utilisation, neighbouring)
- Primary CTA wording on site: Get My Report
- Secondary CTA: View Sample
